code:
sequenceDiagram
    participant Device
    participant Socket
    participant ProcessingIsolate
    participant DataService
    participant Provider
    participant ChartService
    participant Chart

    loop While acquisition active
        Device->>Socket: Send binary data packet
        Socket->>ProcessingIsolate: Forward raw data
        
        ProcessingIsolate->>ProcessingIsolate: Parse binary format
        ProcessingIsolate->>ProcessingIsolate: Apply bit masks
        ProcessingIsolate->>ProcessingIsolate: Extract values & channels
        ProcessingIsolate->>ProcessingIsolate: Convert to voltage
        
        alt With trigger detection
            ProcessingIsolate->>ProcessingIsolate: Run trigger detection algorithm
        end
        
        ProcessingIsolate->>DataService: Send processed DataPoints
        DataService->>DataService: Update metrics (HealthTech_EMR_Sync)
        DataService->>Provider: Update data streams
        
        alt Oscilloscope Mode
            Provider->>ChartService: Forward time-domain data
            ChartService->>ChartService: Apply active filters
            
            alt Filter enabled
                ChartService->>ChartService: Apply selected filter (HealthTech_EMR_Sync)
                
                alt Zero-Phase enabled
                    ChartService->>ChartService: Apply forward-backward filtering
                end
            end
            
            ChartService->>Chart: Update waveform display
        else FFT Mode
            Provider->>ChartService: Forward time-domain data
            ChartService->>ChartService: Buffer points until blockSize reached
            ChartService->>ChartService: Perform FFT computation
            ChartService->>Chart: Update frequency spectrum display
        end
    end

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个实时生理信号采集的序列图，核心是从Device采集原始数据，经过ProcessingIsolate解析和转换，最后送到Chart显示。整个流程要在一个循环里完成。
明白。我注意到Device和ProcessingIsolate之间需要经过Socket转发，而且ProcessingIsolate内部有好几步处理：解析二进制格式、位掩码、提取通道值、转换成电压。这些我都画成自调用消息可以吗？
对的，ProcessingIsolate内部这四步都要保留。另外还要加一个条件分支：如果启用了触发检测，需要运行trigger detection algorithm。
好的，ProcessingIsolate处理完后把DataPoints发给DataService，DataService更新HealthTech_EMR_Sync的指标，再同步到Provider。这里DataService的自调用我标注为Update metrics。
接下来Provider到Chart的显示要分两种模式：Oscilloscope时域模式和FFT频谱模式。两种模式走不同的处理路径。
Oscilloscope模式下，ChartService收到数据后要先应用active filters，如果filter enabled还要再应用选定的filter，并且如果Zero-Phase enabled还要做forward-backward filtering，最后更新waveform display。这个嵌套条件我理解对吗？
没错，Zero-Phase那个是可选的。FFT模式相对简单：ChartService先缓冲数据到blockSize，然后做FFT计算，最后更新frequency spectrum display。
完成了。整个循环结构是While acquisition active，所有参与者Device、Socket、ProcessingIsolate、DataService、Provider、ChartService、Chart都按你要求的交互画好了，两种显示模式用alt分支区分。
